response.justification: The candidate has experience with distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-driven development, aligning well with the job requirements. Their background in technical strategy and stakeholder management is also relevant.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proven technical leadership and strategic decision-making
concerns: Limited direct experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
